title: Nether Zombies
description: A MOD Which Adds Nether Zombies
body:
No zombies or zombie variants in the nether?  This mod is here to fix that. 

Available For Versions: 1.20.1 and 1.20.4

Report any bugs, problems, or feature requests to the issue tracker

 

This MOD adds;

- Five brand new zombies to battle it out with through the depths of hell

- Custom creative tab for easy access of spawn eggs

- Custom AI, with each zombie behaving differently

 

Textures By: TGWCreeper
